name: Killer Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: Green onions (1/4 cup, both white and green parts, chopped)
Fresh snow peas (1/4 pound), strings removed
Zucchini slices (2 small zucchini, 1/4 inch slices)
Red bell pepper strips (1 large red bell pepper, seeded)
Short pasta (rotelle, fusilli or penne, 1 pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the dressing, combine all ingredients in a jar and shake until creamy.
2. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook snow peas for 1 minute, then remove with a long-handled strainer and immediately drench with cold water to stop cooking process and brighten color.
3. Repeat with broccoli and zucchini, cooking each for 3 minutes. Combine cooked vegetables in a bowl with red bell pepper and toss with half the dressing.
4. Cook pasta in vegetable water for 8-10 minutes. Drain, rinse with cold water, and drain again. Toss with remaining dressing.
5. Combine vegetables and pasta. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve, at least one hour or up to two days, covered. Makes 8-10 servings.
